name: Star Runner: Cosmic Escape
description: Star Runner: Cosmic Escape is an epic space arcade runner where you steer a sleek ship through a glowing starfield. Collect golden stars to complete each level while dodging dangerous asteroids. Activate Shield and Magnet power-ups to survive longer and grab rewards faster. Face a massive boss asteroid and chase high scores. Developer web: freecrazygames.io
instructions: Move with mouse or touch use A D or arrows press M
